possible_inference: Describe a bounded defensive inference without claiming actual collection or intent.
source_locators: Replace with an exact registered public locator.
alternative_explanations: State at least one benign or non-proprietary explanation.
what_it_cannot_prove: State the missing arrow or evidentiary limitation.
confidentiality_privilege_privacy_risk: Explain the distinct data and professional-duty risks.
countercontrols: Name a technical, contractual, governance, or human control.
applies_when: State the bounded conditions under which the inference is relevant.
does_not_apply_when: State the conditions under which reuse would be misleading or unsafe.
danger_if_misapplied: Explain how the pathway could become an overclaim or extraction blueprint.
